name: Leo Sun
shortBio: Leads Wuhan and Harbin coverage, with a focus on practical city use, seasonal constraints, and underexplained first-time visitor decisions.
fullBio: Leo Sun is a city guides editor at China Travel Notes. He leads Wuhan and Harbin coverage and specializes in practical city-use questions, seasonal constraints, station-and-airport decisions, and the kinds of first-time visitor tradeoffs that matter most in cities that are often underestimated from abroad.
reviewProcess: Leo reviews pages for practical clarity, seasonality, station and airport usefulness, and whether advice for less internationally familiar cities still feels confident without being overbuilt.
seoDescription: Read Wuhan and Harbin planning guides by Leo Sun at China Travel Notes.
